description_long: This airplane features a sleek, streamlined fuselage with a pointed nose and a long, tapering tail boom. The wings are mounted low on the body and extend outward with a slight forward sweep, each ending in a rounded, gray engine nacelle. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a dark canopy. The overall color scheme is a combination of bright yellow and gray, giving it a distinctive and modern appearance. The tail section is minimalistic, with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers. The design suggests a fast, agile aircraft, likely intended for advanced or futuristic urban environments.
description: A sleek, yellow and gray airplane with low-mounted, forward-swept wings and rounded engine nacelles, featuring a pointed nose and an enclosed cockpit near the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide low-mounted wings, and rounded engine nacelles on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, tapering tail boom, the forward-swept wings, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single vertical stabilizer, the symmetry of the wings, and the narrow tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the elongated fuselage, engine nacelles, and the cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with forward-swept wings and rounded engine nacelles; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wing-mounted nacelles.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with a minimalistic tail boom; no visible horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single-seat.
